case.name: Murder of Madeline Soto
case.jurisdiction: Osceola County, Florida (primary); Orange County, Florida (cooperating)
case.summary: Madeline Soto, a 13-year-old girl from Kissimmee, Florida, was reported missing on February 26, 2024, by her mother Jennifer Soto, after she failed to be picked up from Hunter's Creek Middle School. Investigation revealed that her mother's boyfriend, Stephan Sterns, who had been sexually abusing Madeline for years, had murdered her that morning. Her body was discovered on March 1, 2024, in a wooded area off Hickory Tree Road in Osceola County. On July 21, 2025, Sterns pleaded no contest to first-degree murder and guilty to 60 child sex abuse charges, receiving 21 concurrent life sentences without the possibility of parole.

people.description: 13-year-old student at Hunter's Creek Middle School in Kissimmee, FL. Approximately 5'1" tall, blonde hair, blue eyes. Diagnosed with ADHD and anxiety disorder. Prescribed 20mg Adderall and 25mg Hydroxyzine.
people.relationship_to_case: Murder victim and victim of long-term sexual abuse

people.description: Boyfriend of Jennifer Soto (Madeline's mother). At time of crime, dating Jennifer on and off for approximately seven years. Had moved out of the home in November/December 2023 but maintained access to the residence and frequently slept there. Drove a silver 2010 Lincoln MKZ (FL Tag: IYLL82). Also used inmate ID 1419688.
people.relationship_to_case: Convicted of first-degree murder, sexual battery, and 60 child sex abuse offenses; sentenced to 21 concurrent life sentences

people.description: Mother of Madeline Soto, girlfriend of Stephan Sterns. Worked at Disney. Described having anxiety and mental health issues; took sleeping medication. Reported Madeline missing on February 26, 2024.
people.relationship_to_case: Mother of victim; key witness; was interviewed multiple times by detectives; not charged

people.description: Biological father of Madeline Soto. Delivered a victim impact statement at the sentencing hearing on July 21, 2025.
people.relationship_to_case: Father of victim; provided victim impact statement at sentencing

people.description: Madeline's maternal grandmother. Described herself as feeling like a second mother to Madeline. Her workplace was visited by Sterns on the afternoon of February 26, 2024.
people.relationship_to_case: Grandmother of victim; provided written victim impact statement read at sentencing

people.description: Aunt of Madeline Soto.
people.relationship_to_case: Delivered tearful in-person victim impact statement at the plea/sentencing hearing

people.description: Jennifer Soto's father; had previously lived in the same household.
people.relationship_to_case: Family member; lived with the family during prior years

people.description: Jennifer Soto's ex-husband, married 2015, divorced 2016. Father of Ashlynn Young. Considered Madeline as his daughter. Moved to Colorado in 2022.
people.relationship_to_case: Provided witness statement on March 5, 2024 about household dynamics and history

people.description: Daughter of Steven Young; raised alongside Madeline; played online games with her monthly.
people.relationship_to_case: Was raised alongside Madeline; potential witness to family/home dynamics

people.description: Roommate of Jennifer Soto. Arrived home approximately 10:30 PM on February 25, 2024. Reported being inside her bedroom on the morning of February 26, 2024 and only seeing Stephan doing laundry. Was also identified as a victim of Sterns; explicit photos of her were allegedly found on his phone.
people.relationship_to_case: Witness to events at the residence; spoke at the plea hearing as an additional victim

people.description: Father of Stephan Sterns. Lives in North Port, Florida. Maintained a storage unit on Executive Avenue. Received recorded jail calls from Stephan and provided crucial evidence (a hard drive and USB drives) recovered from the storage unit.
people.relationship_to_case: Witness; recorded jail calls with the suspect; provided physical evidence (hard drive and USB drives) to police

people.description: Mother of Stephan Sterns. Was the subject of a supplemental detective report by Detective Fegan on February 28, 2024.
people.relationship_to_case: Family member of suspect; subject of investigative report

people.description: Civilian witness who reported seeing a man matching Stephan Sterns' description holding a tire iron next to a silver sedan on Hickory Tree Road on February 26, 2024 at approximately 1:20 PM.
people.relationship_to_case: Provided eyewitness sighting that helped narrow the search area for Madeline's body

people.description: Resident at 4030 Packard Avenue, Saint Cloud, Florida. Called in a tip about seeing a man resembling Stephan changing a tire south of Hickory Tree Road and Old Hickory Tree Road on February 26, 2024.
people.relationship_to_case: Tipster who reported seeing the suspect's vehicle in the area where the body was found

people.agency: Kissimmee Police Department / Orange County Sheriff's Office
people.description: Detective who conducted multiple interviews with Jennifer Soto and processed initial investigative leads. Conducted PRTT for victim's social media.
people.relationship_to_case: Primary interviewing detective; conducted interviews with Jennifer Soto

people.description: Detective who traveled to St. Cloud with another detective to locate video surveillance along Hickory Tree Road.
people.relationship_to_case: Investigative role tracking suspect's vehicle movements

people.description: Detective who responded to Osceola County Jail with another detective on March 15, 2024 to execute the search warrant for Stephan's fingerprints.
people.relationship_to_case: Executed fingerprint collection warrant

people.description: Detective who responded to interview Walter Roska on March 20, 2024, and conducted a March 1 interview with another detective.
people.relationship_to_case: Conducted witness interviews

people.description: Detective who conducted joint interview with Detective Smallwood (KPD) on March 1, 2024.
people.relationship_to_case: Joint interview detective

people.description: Detective who, on February 28, 2024, located the victim's backpack with laptop, notes, and a Croc inside the dumpster at the apartment complex.
people.relationship_to_case: Recovered key physical evidence from dumpster

people.description: Detective who seized Stephan's phone on February 27, 2024.
people.relationship_to_case: Conducted phone seizure

people.description: Sex Crimes detective who gathered hotel surveillance photos of Stephan and Christopher Sterns on February 28, 2024.
people.relationship_to_case: Sex Crimes investigation; gathered hotel surveillance evidence

people.description: Authored an investigative report dated February 28, 2024.
people.relationship_to_case: Investigative reporting detective

people.description: Authored Stephan Sterns Incident Report dated February 28, 2024.
people.relationship_to_case: Authored incident report

people.description: Authored a supplemental report regarding Debra Sterns dated February 28, 2024.
people.relationship_to_case: Authored supplemental investigative report

people.description: Detective who located tire tread evidence at Old Hickory Tree Road / Dory on February 28, 2024.
people.relationship_to_case: Recovered tire tread evidence near body recovery site

people.description: Corporal who authored the search warrant for Stephan's fingerprints, signed by Judge John Beamer on March 14, 2024.
people.relationship_to_case: Authored fingerprint search warrant

people.description: Requested a Code Red alert at 7:50 PM on February 27, 2024.
people.relationship_to_case: Requested Code Red emergency notification

people.description: Captain who, along with Sergeant Sharise Swan, responded to the area identified by witness Thomas Carris and located Madeline's body on March 1, 2024.
people.relationship_to_case: Discovered Madeline's body in wooded area off Hickory Tree Road

people.description: Sergeant who knew the property owner of the location where Madeline's body was found and obtained access to the locked gates. Responded with Captain Mingone.
people.relationship_to_case: Obtained access to property where body was discovered

people.description: Crime Analyst who contacted witness Thomas Carris on March 1, 2024 and relayed his information to deputies searching the area.
people.relationship_to_case: Crime analyst who developed witness lead leading to body recovery

people.description: Crime Scene Technician who responded to Osceola County Jail to collect Stephan's fingerprints on March 15, 2024.
people.relationship_to_case: Collected fingerprint evidence from suspect

people.description: Crime Scene Supervisor who responded with Technician Figueroa to collect fingerprints from Stephan.
people.relationship_to_case: Supervised fingerprint collection from suspect

people.description: FDLE Agent who examined the hard drive and USB drives provided by Christopher Sterns. Identified over 35,000 images of child pornography on one of the USB drives.
people.relationship_to_case: Conducted digital forensic examination of recovered drives

people.description: Medical Examiner who performed the autopsy on Madeline Soto on March 2, 2024. Identified concerning damage to the right portion of the hyoid bone, suggesting strangulation.
people.relationship_to_case: Performed autopsy; ruled cause of death as strangulation (homicide)

people.agency: State Attorney's Office, Ninth Judicial Circuit
people.description: State Attorney who led the interview of Jennifer Soto under oath on April 18, 2024 at the Osceola County Courthouse.
people.relationship_to_case: Led prosecution interviews; handled investigative subpoena process

people.description: Attorney who accompanied Jennifer Soto to the April 18, 2024 interview at the State Attorney's Office.
people.relationship_to_case: Represented Jennifer Soto during investigative subpoena interview

people.description: Florida judge who signed the March 14, 2024 search warrant for Stephan Sterns' fingerprints.
people.relationship_to_case: Signed fingerprint search warrant

people.description: Florida judge who signed search warrants on March 28, 2024 for Madeline's medical records (OPA Behavioral Health) and for Stephan's Fitbit device data from Google.
people.relationship_to_case: Signed medical records and Fitbit search warrants

people.description: Florida judge who signed search warrants on April 15 and April 17, 2024 for the hard drive/USB drives and for iCloud records from Apple.
people.relationship_to_case: Signed digital forensic and cloud data search warrants

people.description: Florida judge who signed search warrants on April 30, 2024 for Madeline's pediatrician and gastroenterologist records.
people.relationship_to_case: Signed pediatric and gastroenterology medical records warrants

people.description: A teacher at Hunter's Creek Middle School in Orange County, Florida. Arrested on October 22, 2024 on a federal criminal complaint for possession of child sexual abuse material — charges unrelated to the Soto case but at the same school Madeline attended.
people.relationship_to_case: Tangential connection only - taught at Madeline's school; arrested on unrelated charges

people.description: Music teacher at Hunter's Creek Middle School in Orange County, Florida. Arrested on February 4, 2025 on federal charges for coercion and enticement of a minor — charges unrelated to the Soto case.
people.relationship_to_case: Tangential connection only - taught at Madeline's school; arrested on unrelated charges

timeline_events.title: Madeline Sophia Soto is born
timeline_events.description: Madeline Sophia Soto is born. She would later live with her mother Jennifer Soto and Jennifer's boyfriend Stephan Sterns in Kissimmee, Florida.

timeline_events.title: Jennifer Soto marries Steven Young
timeline_events.description: Jennifer Soto marries Steven Young, whom she met through a dating website. They live in Venetian Bay along with Jennifer's father Juan, Madeline, and Steven's daughter Ashlynn.

timeline_events.title: Jennifer Soto and Steven Young divorce
timeline_events.description: Steven Young files for divorce after Jennifer begins experiencing mental health issues; Steven decides to remove his daughter Ashlynn from the household environment.

timeline_events.title: Approximate beginning of Stephan Sterns' relationship with Jennifer Soto
timeline_events.description: Stephan Sterns begins dating Jennifer Soto on and off (relationship lasted approximately 7 years prior to February 2024).

timeline_events.title: Earliest known sexual abuse imagery (Madeline age ~8)
timeline_events.description: Per Wikipedia and law enforcement reports based on evidence recovered from Sterns' phone and Google Drive, sexual abuse imagery dates back to when Madeline was approximately 8 years old.
timeline_events.source: Wikipedia (Murder of Madeline Soto); Osceola County SO

timeline_events.title: Steven Young moves to Colorado
timeline_events.description: Steven Young, Jennifer Soto's ex-husband, moves to Colorado.

timeline_events.title: Stephan Sterns moves out of household
timeline_events.description: Stephan Sterns moves out of the residence shared with Jennifer Soto in late 2023 (November/December), but continues to visit and frequently sleeps at the home.

timeline_events.title: Madeline texts Stephan a photograph of two coins
timeline_events.description: Forensic recovery of Madeline's phone shows she sent Stephan a text message containing a photograph of two coins.

timeline_events.title: Madeline's 13th birthday
timeline_events.description: Madeline turns 13 years old.

timeline_events.title: Christopher Sterns observes Stephan using desktop computer
timeline_events.description: Christopher Sterns later reports witnessing his son Stephan using a desktop computer at the North Port residence on this date — significant because Stephan would later be found to have removed the hard drive.

timeline_events.title: Madeline's 13th birthday family celebration
timeline_events.description: Madeline celebrates her 13th birthday with family. Stephan was not invited because Jennifer's mother does not get along with him.

timeline_events.title: Last confirmed sighting of Madeline Soto by mother
timeline_events.description: Jennifer Soto last sees Madeline alive at approximately 8:00 PM. Madeline picks out clothes for the next day.

timeline_events.title: Madeline's iPhone health data: 9 steps
timeline_events.description: Madeline's iPhone health/steps data records 9 steps taken at 10:09 PM.

timeline_events.title: Jennifer arrives home from Disney work shift
timeline_events.description: Jennifer Soto arrives home from her Disney shift at approximately 10:30 PM. Stephan and Madeline are downstairs together.

timeline_events.title: Roommate Angelica Nigro arrives home
timeline_events.description: Roommate Angelica Nigro arrives home at approximately 10:30 PM. She does not see either Stephan or Madeline that night.

timeline_events.title: Madeline's iPhone records 31 steps and 1 floor climbed
timeline_events.description: Madeline's phone health data shows 31 steps and 1 floor climbed — consistent with Jennifer sending Madeline and Stephan upstairs to bed.

timeline_events.title: Madeline's iPhone plugged in to charge
timeline_events.description: Madeline's iPhone is plugged into the charger.

timeline_events.title: Text exchange between Jennifer and Stephan about Madeline going to bed
timeline_events.description: Jennifer texts Stephan: 'Make sure she goes to bed right now'. Stephan replies: 'Ok sweetie, goodnight'. Jennifer replies: 'Goodnight'. At 23:40, Stephan texts: 'She's built her nest and she's settling in now'. Jennifer replies: 'Ok good'.

timeline_events.title: Jennifer places phone on wireless charger
timeline_events.description: Jennifer Soto places her cell phone on a wireless charger and sets an alarm for 9:00 AM the next morning.

timeline_events.title: Madeline's iPhone unplugged from charger
timeline_events.description: Madeline's iPhone is unplugged from the charger. This pattern of phone use is not typical of her normal day.

timeline_events.title: Madeline's iPhone records 113 steps
timeline_events.description: Madeline's iPhone health data records 113 steps.

timeline_events.title: Madeline's iPhone records 50 steps
timeline_events.description: Madeline's iPhone health data records 50 additional steps.

timeline_events.title: Madeline's iPhone powered off
timeline_events.description: Madeline's iPhone is powered off at 7:16 AM. Investigators conclude this activity was not done by Madeline herself.

timeline_events.title: Stephan drives to dumpster with body in passenger seat
timeline_events.description: Stephan Sterns is seen on surveillance camera driving his silver 2010 Lincoln MKZ to the dumpster in Venetian Bay. He is wearing a red shirt and tan pants. A white female wearing a green sweatshirt is in the passenger seat with her head slumped to the left in an unnatural position. The female does not move while Stephan exits or enters the vehicle. The female is identified as Madeline.
timeline_events.location: Venetian Bay apartment complex dumpster, Kissimmee, FL
evidence_referenced: 2010 Silver Lincoln MKZ FL Tag IYLL82

timeline_events.title: Stephan throws items in dumpster
timeline_events.description: Stephan is seen on complex camera throwing two large white trash bags into the complex dumpster. These bags contained Madeline's backpack, school-issued laptop, a single Croc, and a tire.

timeline_events.title: Stephan leaves complex with victim
timeline_events.description: Stephan leaves the apartment complex with the victim in the passenger seat. Vehicle U-turns at Church Town Loop / Hunter Park.

timeline_events.title: License plate reader captures vehicle southbound
timeline_events.description: License Plate Reader (LPR) captures the silver Lincoln MKZ (FL Tag: IYLL82) southbound on John Young Parkway at the Osceola County line.
timeline_events.location: SB JYP / SB Osceola County Line

timeline_events.title: Vehicle observed south on John Young Parkway
timeline_events.description: Stephan is captured driving south on John Young Parkway approaching Thacker Avenue. Madeline is still in the passenger seat in the same slumped position.

timeline_events.title: Vehicle re-enters and exits Venetian Bay
timeline_events.description: Stephan enters Venetian Bay and exits the rear of the complex at 8:31 AM. Madeline is still in the front passenger seat in the same slumped position.

timeline_events.title: Stephan claims to drop Madeline at school - actually at Townloop/Lilac Cove
timeline_events.description: According to Stephan's later statement, he dropped Madeline off at Townloop/Lilac Cove between 8:30 and 8:45 AM, claiming she was embarrassed by his old car. Surveillance, however, shows the car driving away — Madeline never arrived at school.

timeline_events.title: Vehicle eastbound on Osceola Parkway / Thacker
timeline_events.description: Camera captures the silver 2010 Lincoln MKZ (FL Tag: IYLL82) eastbound on Osceola Parkway at Thacker.

timeline_events.title: Vehicle U-turn near smoke shop
timeline_events.description: Stephan's vehicle U-turns at Townloop / Huntwick to head to a smoke shop.

timeline_events.title: Vehicle on red light camera at JYP / Town Center
timeline_events.description: Red light camera captures the vehicle northbound on John Young Parkway at Town Center.

timeline_events.title: Jennifer wakes up
timeline_events.description: Jennifer Soto wakes up. She did not see Stephan before he allegedly took Madeline to school.

timeline_events.title: Vehicle observed north on International Drive
timeline_events.description: Stephan is captured driving north on International Drive at Central Florida Parkway. Madeline is still in the passenger seat in the same slumped position. This confirms Stephan did NOT drop Madeline near school as he had claimed.

timeline_events.title: Vehicle on red light camera at Central Florida Parkway / International Drive
timeline_events.description: Red light camera captures the silver 2010 Lincoln MKZ (FL Tag: 1YLL82) eastbound at Central Florida Parkway / International Drive.
timeline_events.location: EB Central Florida Parkway / International Drive

timeline_events.title: Vehicle on camera at Orangewood / Gateway
timeline_events.description: Vehicle captured on a business camera eastbound on Orangewood at Gateway.

timeline_events.title: Jennifer's phone removed from wireless charger
timeline_events.description: Jennifer's cellular phone is physically removed from the wireless charger, consistent with normal behavior of removing alarm notifications.

timeline_events.title: Jennifer leaves residence for blood draw appointment
timeline_events.description: Jennifer Soto leaves the residence for a medical appointment to have blood drawn. She does not see Stephan before leaving.

timeline_events.title: Stephan enters parking garage at 9271 S John Young Parkway (Holiday Inn area)
timeline_events.description: Stephan drives into the parking garage of 9271 South John Young Parkway. He drives up to the second level and backs his vehicle into a parking space by the stairs in the northeast corner. He exits the vehicle and walks toward the rear, opening the trunk.
timeline_events.location: 9271 South John Young Parkway, Orlando, FL (Holiday Inn parking garage)

timeline_events.title: CRITICAL: Stephan places Madeline's body in trunk
timeline_events.description: Stephan is observed on parking garage surveillance placing Madeline — wearing a green sweatshirt and blue pants, with limp body — into the trunk of his vehicle. He then exits the parking garage.
timeline_events.location: 9271 South John Young Parkway parking garage

timeline_events.title: Stephan re-enters Venetian Bay alone
timeline_events.description: Stephan enters Venetian Bay through the east gate of the complex. Madeline is no longer visible in the front passenger seat.

timeline_events.title: Stephan makes outgoing call
timeline_events.description: Stephan makes an outgoing phone call.

timeline_events.title: Stephan returns to dumpster with more trash
timeline_events.description: Stephan is seen on surveillance driving to the dumpster in Venetian Bay and throwing away more trash.

timeline_events.title: Madeline's iPhone turned back on; 8 steps recorded
timeline_events.description: Madeline's iPhone is turned back on at 10:55 AM, with 8 steps recorded — coinciding with Stephan being back at the residence. Per Angelica's statement, only Stephan and Angelica were home at this time, and Angelica was in her bedroom.

timeline_events.title: Stephan's phone begins moving from apartment
timeline_events.description: Stephan's phone begins moving away from the apartment.

timeline_events.title: Stephan visits eSmokerOnline Vape Shop
timeline_events.description: Stephan drives to 13651 South John Young Parkway (eSmokerOnline Vape Shop). He makes a purchase and leaves shortly afterwards.
timeline_events.location: 13651 S John Young Parkway, Orlando, FL

timeline_events.title: Vehicle eastbound on Highway 192 toward Saint Cloud
timeline_events.description: Stephan's vehicle travels east on Highway 192 toward Saint Cloud, Florida. Captured on multiple traffic cameras and license plate readers.

timeline_events.title: Vehicle southbound on Old Hickory Tree Road
timeline_events.description: Stephan is observed driving south on Old Hickory Tree Road, passing Hickory Tree.
timeline_events.location: Old Hickory Tree Road, St. Cloud, FL

timeline_events.title: Vehicle passes Hickory Tree Elementary School
timeline_events.description: Stephan's vehicle passes Hickory Tree Elementary School on Old Hickory Tree Road.
timeline_events.location: Hickory Tree Elementary School area, St. Cloud, FL

timeline_events.title: Witness Thomas Carris sees Stephan with tire iron
timeline_events.description: Civilian witness Thomas Carris observes a person matching Stephan's description holding a tire iron next to a silver sedan on Hickory Tree Road. He reports this on March 1, 2024.
timeline_events.location: Hickory Tree Road, St. Cloud, FL

timeline_events.title: Vehicle westbound on Highway 192 with spare tire
timeline_events.description: Stephan's vehicle is observed traveling west on Highway 192 from Old Hickory Tree Road. The vehicle now has a donut spare tire on the rear driver's side. (Note: Crimetimelines.com lists this event at approximately 2:30 PM, indicating Stephan stopped to change the tire near Old Hickory Tree Road and disposed of the body there.)

timeline_events.title: Madeline's iPhone records 54 steps
timeline_events.description: Madeline's iPhone health data records 54 steps — this is when Jennifer would have been taking Madeline's phone with her to pick her up from school.

timeline_events.title: Stephan throws more items in dumpster
timeline_events.description: Stephan is again seen on surveillance throwing items in the dumpster at Venetian Bay.

timeline_events.title: Stephan visits grandmother's workplace
timeline_events.description: Stephan goes to Madeline's grandmother (Yolanda Zambrano)'s workplace and drives around the workplace and the school looking for the victim.

timeline_events.title: Jennifer arrives at Hunter's Creek Middle School to pick up Madeline
timeline_events.description: Jennifer Soto arrives at Hunter's Creek Middle School at approximately 4:30 PM and discovers Madeline never arrived at school. She searches the area and goes to her mother's office unsuccessfully.
timeline_events.location: Hunter's Creek Middle School, Kissimmee, FL

timeline_events.title: Stephan disposes of tire in dumpster
timeline_events.description: Surveillance video shows Stephan placing a tire (the original flat tire from the change-out) into the apartment complex dumpster.

timeline_events.title: Stephan calls 911 to report Madeline missing
timeline_events.description: Stephan Sterns places a 911 call to report Madeline missing.

timeline_events.title: Final steps recorded on Madeline's iPhone
timeline_events.description: 5:03 PM is the last time steps are recorded on Madeline's iPhone.

timeline_events.title: Stephan returns to apartment; family searches
timeline_events.description: Stephan returns to the apartment. Family members help search the area for Madeline.

timeline_events.title: Deputies arrive on scene
timeline_events.description: Sheriff's deputies arrive at the residence in response to the missing person report.

timeline_events.title: Madeline officially reported missing
timeline_events.description: Madeline Soto, age 13, is officially reported missing to the Orange County Sheriff's Office by her mother Jennifer Soto. Case number 24-011313 is opened. Stephan claims he dropped her off near school but her phone was left at home.

timeline_events.title: Stephan factory resets his phone
timeline_events.description: Stephan resets his iPhone, later claiming it was an accident while attempting to update it.

timeline_events.title: Stephan's phone is shut off
timeline_events.description: Stephan's cellular phone is powered off.

timeline_events.title: Detectives interview Jennifer Soto and Stephan Sterns
timeline_events.description: Jennifer Soto and Stephan Sterns are jointly interviewed by detectives at approximately 11:15 PM. They provide details about Stephan dropping Madeline off near school in his silver 2010 Lincoln MKZ. Detectives observe a handgun in the back pocket of the driver's seat and notice the donut spare tire — which Stephan attributes to a flat tire earlier that day.

timeline_events.title: Law Enforcement secures the scene
timeline_events.description: Law Enforcement secures the residence. No one is permitted inside unless escorted by an officer.

timeline_events.title: Stephan's phone factory reset (per phone records)
timeline_events.description: Stephan's phone is factory reset (logged as 00:00 in some reports; he later claims it was accidental during a phone update).

timeline_events.title: Public missing-person alert issued; search efforts begin
timeline_events.description: A public missing-person alert is issued. Authorities question Stephan, who changes details of his account. Search efforts commence across Kissimmee and St. Cloud, involving over 100 personnel.

timeline_events.title: Detective Hunt interviews Jennifer Soto
timeline_events.description: Detective Hunt interviews Jennifer at her residence. Jennifer states she last saw Madeline at approximately 8:00 PM on 02/25/2024. Madeline went to the guest bedroom to sleep with Stephan because Jennifer needed sleep due to her new job.

timeline_events.title: Students at Hunter's Creek Middle School interviewed
timeline_events.description: School Resource Officer interviews students at Hunter's Creek Middle School.

timeline_events.title: Police interview Stephan Sterns; consents to phone search
timeline_events.description: Police interview Stephan Sterns. He provides consent to search his phone but states he had accidentally performed a factory reset on it on 02/26/2024.

timeline_events.title: Command post initiated
timeline_events.description: A command post is established to coordinate the search and investigation.

timeline_events.title: Jennifer's vehicle drives east on Highway 192 - same path as Stephan
timeline_events.description: Jennifer's vehicle is observed driving east on Highway 192 through Kissimmee toward Saint Cloud, taking the exact same path as Stephan had the previous day.

timeline_events.title: Daytime helicopter chase flyover
timeline_events.description: A helicopter conducts a daytime flyover for search purposes.

timeline_events.title: Jennifer's vehicle on Old Hickory Tree Road
timeline_events.description: Jennifer's vehicle is seen driving south on Old Hickory Tree Road from Highway 192.
timeline_events.location: Old Hickory Tree Road, St. Cloud, FL

timeline_events.title: Jennifer's vehicle returns west on Highway 192
timeline_events.description: Jennifer's vehicle is observed turning west on Highway 192 from Old Hickory Tree Road.

timeline_events.title: Second interview with Stephan; consent to phone download
timeline_events.description: Detectives ask Stephan a second time if he consents to the download of his phone. He agrees and provides his pass code.

timeline_events.title: Code Red emergency notification requested
timeline_events.description: Corporal Avila requests a Code Red emergency notification system message.

timeline_events.title: Stephan's phone seized
timeline_events.description: Detective Tagler seizes Stephan's cell phone.

timeline_events.title: Initial PRTT for victim's social media returns negative
timeline_events.description: Detective Hunt obtains an initial Pen Register / Trap and Trace (PRTT) for the victim's social media, which returns negative results.

timeline_events.title: Code Red sent; K-9 track conducted
timeline_events.description: Code Red emergency notification is sent. Osceola K-9 conducts a track which is negative.

timeline_events.title: License plate readers reveal St. Cloud trip
timeline_events.description: Detectives discover via LPR data that Stephan's vehicle traveled to St. Cloud on the morning he claimed to have dropped Madeline off at school. DOT cameras follow Stephan from Kissimmee to St. Cloud where he turned south onto Hickory Tree Road. Approximately 45 minutes later, the vehicle is seen again — now with a spare tire. A subpoena is submitted for additional video.

timeline_events.title: DNA warrant and arrest warrant drafted
timeline_events.description: The Orange County Sexual Assault Unit drafts a DNA warrant along with an arrest warrant for Stephan Michael Sterns.

timeline_events.title: Detectives review Venetian Bay video
timeline_events.description: Detectives review video from Venetian Bay and observe Stephan's vehicle exiting the complex with a female wearing a green sweater in the front passenger seat — slumped over to the left in an abnormal way.

timeline_events.title: Vehicle towed to Orange County Police Services
timeline_events.description: Stephan's silver 2010 Lincoln MKZ (FL Tag: IYLL82) is towed to Orange County Police Services for processing.

timeline_events.title: Stephan leaves hotel through front lobby
timeline_events.description: On hotel surveillance, Stephan is observed leaving through the front lobby. Photo gathered by Sex Crimes Detective Acosta.

timeline_events.title: Stephan logs into Google from Christopher Sterns' address
timeline_events.description: Per FBI CAST analysis, Stephan logs into his Google account from Christopher Sterns' (his father's) address between 06:34 and 07:09 AM.

timeline_events.title: Christopher Sterns observed leaving hotel
timeline_events.description: Christopher Sterns is observed on hotel surveillance leaving through the front lobby. Photo gathered by Detective Acosta of the Sex Crimes Unit.

timeline_events.title: Search warrant executed on Lincoln MKZ
timeline_events.description: Detectives execute the search warrant on Stephan's silver 2010 Lincoln MKZ.

timeline_events.title: Tire tread evidence located on Old Hickory Tree Road
timeline_events.description: Detective Savelli locates tire tread evidence at Old Hickory Tree Road / Dory.
timeline_events.location: Old Hickory Tree Road / Dory, St. Cloud, FL

timeline_events.title: Stephan brought into Central Operations; Nissan taken into custody
timeline_events.description: Stephan and others are brought into Central Operations. A Nissan Sentra is taken into custody for processing.

timeline_events.title: Stephan Sterns arrested on sexual battery and CSAM charges
timeline_events.description: Stephan Sterns is arrested for sexual battery on a victim under 12 years old and possession of child pornography. Osceola County issues an arrest warrant. A search warrant is obtained to collect his DNA, executed by Orange County detectives and forensic unit.
timeline_events.source: Affidavit of Arrest Warrant; Osceola County records

timeline_events.title: Detective Belardes recovers backpack, laptop, and Croc from dumpster
timeline_events.description: Detective Belardes locates the victim's backpack with laptop, notes, and a single Croc inside the apartment complex dumpster. A piece of a tire is also recovered. The black Hawaiian-print backpack contains an Orange County Public Schools laptop. The Croc matches one found in Madeline's residence.

timeline_events.title: Jennifer interviewed at Sheriff's Office
timeline_events.description: Jennifer is interviewed in a conference room at the Sheriff's Office. She is asked about Madeline's disappearance and household dynamics. Jennifer states she and Stephan had been dating on and off for approximately seven years. Jennifer is shown photographs of Stephan's penis for identification — she does not want to believe Stephan and Madeline were sexually active. Jennifer describes their sex life as 'vanilla'.

timeline_events.title: CSAM and abuse imagery discovered on Stephan's phone and Google Drive
timeline_events.description: Search warrant executed on Stephan's phone reveals images saved to Google Drive. A separate search warrant served to Google produces images and videos depicting an apparent child with genitals as the focal point — including sexual abuse content. The imagery includes evidence of abuse dating back to when Madeline was approximately 8 years old.

timeline_events.title: Mobile tracking device warrants - Lincoln, Nissan, Honda
timeline_events.description: Osceola County SO obtains mobile tracking device warrants for Stephan's Lincoln MKZ, a Nissan Sentra, and a Honda Civic.

timeline_events.title: Search warrants for Discord, Instagram, and Google
timeline_events.description: Osceola County SO obtains search warrants for Stephan's Discord and Instagram accounts and for Google records.

timeline_events.title: Forensic biology lab report - possible semen in Lincoln MKZ
timeline_events.description: Forensic Biology Lab Report indicates possible semen in the Lincoln MKZ.

timeline_events.title: Forensic Unit begins processing apartment
timeline_events.description: The Forensic Unit begins processing Madeline's apartment. Authorities confirm Stephan never dropped Madeline at school and suspect he moved her body that morning.

timeline_events.title: Detectives contact Jennifer about additional evidence collection
timeline_events.description: Detectives advise Jennifer that crime scene technicians are coming to collect additional items seen in Stephan's photographs. Jennifer confirms that on the morning of 02/26/2024, she was woken up by Stephan trying to put a leash on the dog. She admits that despite a prior written statement, she did NOT actually see Madeline that morning. She also discusses Stephan wanting anal sex (which she declined) and Madeline's medications.

timeline_events.title: Extradition felony warrant issued for Stephan Michael Sterns
timeline_events.description: An extradition felony warrant is issued for Stephan Michael Sterns.

timeline_events.title: Detectives interview roommate Angelica Nigro
timeline_events.description: Detectives interview Angelica Nigro, one of Jennifer's roommates. She states she arrived home at approximately 10:30 PM on 02/25/2024, did not see Stephan or Madeline that night, and notes that Jennifer falls into a deep sleep when she takes her sleeping medication.

timeline_events.title: Apartment processing complete
timeline_events.description: Forensic processing of the apartment is complete. Numerous items are recovered including: Apple laptop, WD external hard drive, HP laptop, tripod, comforters, towels, clothing items, panties (multiple sizes), and a pink notebook.

timeline_events.title: Detectives follow up with Jennifer about her search for Madeline
timeline_events.description: Detectives meet Jennifer at her residence for a follow-up interview. Jennifer becomes silent and starts crying, saying she has been avoiding internet coverage as it is traumatizing. She admits she has not physically searched anywhere for Madeline because she wanted to be home in case she returned. She is staying at her sister's house. She discusses her prior marriage to Steven Young and his daughter Ashlynn.

timeline_events.title: Detectives O'Malley (OCSO) and Smallwood (KPD) joint interview
timeline_events.description: Joint interview conducted by Detective O'Malley (Orange County SO) and Detective Smallwood (Kissimmee PD).

timeline_events.title: Crime Analyst Donna Sita receives tip from Thomas Carris
timeline_events.description: Crime Analyst Donna Sita from Osceola County SO contacts witness Thomas Carris. Thomas states he saw a person matching Stephan's description with a tire iron next to a silver sedan on Hickory Tree Road on 02/26/2024 at approximately 1:20 PM. Thomas provides photos and points out the location on a map. Donna relays the information to deputies.
timeline_events.location: Hickory Tree Road, St. Cloud, FL

timeline_events.title: MADELINE SOTO'S BODY DISCOVERED
timeline_events.description: Captain Lori Mingone and Sergeant Sharise Swan respond to the area identified by Thomas Carris. Sergeant Swan knows the property owner, who provides access to locked gates. Captain Mingone walks toward a row of bamboo trees to the left of the opened gate and locates a small body wearing blue jeans and a green sweater. The body has dried grass and hay on top. The location is described as 'Hickory Tree and Brick Canal'.
timeline_events.location: Wooded area off Hickory Tree Road, near Brick Canal, Osceola County, FL
timeline_events.source: Osceola County SO report; Captain Mingone discovery

timeline_events.title: Community vigil held near body location
timeline_events.description: A community vigil is held in the evening near the location where Madeline's body was discovered.

timeline_events.title: Autopsy performed by Dr. Stephan Giles
timeline_events.description: Dr. Stephan Giles performs the autopsy on Madeline Soto. Examination of the body — already noted that her socks were clean on the bottom (suggesting she had not walked there) — reveals the right portion of the hyoid bone is not intact, possibly indicating strangulation. Cause of death is initially listed as pending. Final ruling: homicide by strangulation.

timeline_events.title: Stephan Sterns waives first court appearance
timeline_events.description: Stephan Sterns waives his first court appearance.

timeline_events.title: Steven Young identified and interviewed
timeline_events.description: Steven Young is identified as Jennifer's ex-husband (married 2015, divorced 2016). Steven describes meeting Jennifer through a dating website, living at Venetian Bay, and considers Madeline as his daughter. Ashlynn and Madeline played online games once a month. Steven moved to Colorado in 2022.

timeline_events.title: Search warrant for Gated Storage Facility B-124
timeline_events.description: Search warrant obtained for a gated storage facility unit B-124 connected to Stephan Sterns.

timeline_events.title: FDLE investigates social media leak
timeline_events.description: Florida Department of Law Enforcement investigates a social media posting mistake. Documents reveal Sterns may have abused Madeline since she was 11 (or, per Wikipedia, as early as age 8), supported by explicit media on his device.

timeline_events.title: Over 60 additional charges filed against Sterns
timeline_events.description: Over 60 additional charges are filed against Stephan Sterns, including lewd acts, sexual battery of a minor under 12, and possession of child pornography.

timeline_events.title: Search warrant for Sterns' fingerprints
timeline_events.description: Corporal Edward Diehl authors a search warrant to obtain Stephan's fingerprints. The warrant is signed by Judge John Beamer.

timeline_events.title: Sterns' fingerprints collected at Osceola County Jail
timeline_events.description: Detective Acevedo and another detective respond to Osceola County Jail to execute the fingerprint warrant. Crime Scene Technician Alex Figueroa and Supervisor Isabel Johnson collect the prints. Stephan cooperates.

timeline_events.title: Witness Walter Roska interviewed
timeline_events.description: Detective Smallwood and another detective respond to 4030 Packard Avenue, Saint Cloud, to interview Walter Roska, who had called in a tip about possibly seeing Stephan changing a tire. Walter places the sighting at approximately 12:00 PM on 02/26/2024 — though investigators note this may be a time mismatch.

timeline_events.title: Search warrants for medical records and Fitbit
timeline_events.description: Judge J. Bigney signs a search warrant for Madeline's medical records (executed at OPA Behavioral Health, 102 Park Place Boulevard #D1, Kissimmee). Records reveal Madeline was diagnosed with ADHD and anxiety disorder. Judge Bigney also signs a warrant for Fitbit data Stephan was wearing on 02/26/2024 — sent to Google.

timeline_events.title: Arraignment scheduled - notice sent
timeline_events.description: Arraignment is scheduled and notice is sent.

timeline_events.title: Stephan calls father from jail - admits something happened
timeline_events.description: Stephan calls Christopher Sterns from Osceola County Jail (using inmate ID 1419688). At 12:57 into the call, Stephan tells Chris: 'you know that I would have never wanted that for her' (referring to Madeline). Stephan then says: 'I am not sure really that any one person is specifically responsible, it's probably a combination of factors that led to it' and 'I have never felt anything like that before, it was horrible'. When Chris says he hopes the truth will come out, Stephan responds 'Well, yeah' as if dodging. The call is downloaded into Evidence.com.

timeline_events.title: Christopher Sterns finds hard drive in storage unit
timeline_events.description: Christopher Sterns calls detectives stating he was cleaning out his storage unit on Executive Avenue and located a hard drive (normally housed in a desktop computer). He also found a watch that Stephan had previously mentioned was in his bedroom. Chris believes Stephan accessed the storage unit on 02/28/2024 during his trip to North Port. It appears Stephan intentionally removed the hard drive to conceal contents.
timeline_events.location: Storage unit on Executive Avenue, North Port, FL

timeline_events.title: Amended Information filed
timeline_events.description: An Amended Information is filed in the case.

timeline_events.title: Detectives retrieve hard drive and USB drives from North Port PD
timeline_events.description: Detectives drive to North Port Police Department to retrieve items provided by Christopher Sterns: a hard drive that appears to have been removed from a desktop tower, plus two USB drives.
timeline_events.location: North Port Police Department, North Port, FL

timeline_events.title: Search warrant for hard drive and USB drives
timeline_events.description: Judge Michael Murphy signs a search warrant for the hard drive and two USB drives. Items are delivered to FDLE Agent Georgie Torres for examination.

timeline_events.title: Search warrant for iCloud records
timeline_events.description: Judge Michael Murphy signs a search warrant for iCloud records from Apple for Jennifer and Madeline. Submitted to Apple via email.

timeline_events.title: Jennifer Soto deposition under oath
timeline_events.description: Jennifer and her attorney Matthews Bark arrive at Kissimmee Police Department for an investigative subpoena interview led by State Attorney Will Jay. Due to technical issues, the interview is moved to the State Attorney's Office at Osceola County Courthouse. Jennifer is placed under oath. She confirms working at Disney the night of 02/25, getting home around 10:30 PM, and other key details. She admits she could not remember if Madeline was wearing the green sweatshirt that night.
timeline_events.location: State Attorney's Office, Osceola County Courthouse

timeline_events.title: FDLE confirms 35,000+ CSAM images on USB drives
timeline_events.description: Detectives respond to FDLE to retrieve downloads from the two USB drives and hard drive. Review reveals one USB drive is empty; the other contains over 35,000 images of child pornography. The hard drive had not been used since 2020 and contains nothing of evidentiary value.

timeline_events.title: Defense files Motion to Continue
timeline_events.description: Defense files a Motion to Continue.

timeline_events.title: Sterns indicted on First-Degree Premeditated Murder
timeline_events.description: The case is brought before a grand jury. Stephan Sterns is indicted on First-Degree Premeditated Murder. A capias is issued.

timeline_events.title: Search warrants for pediatric and gastroenterology records
timeline_events.description: Judge Vincent Chiu signs search warrants for Madeline's pediatrician and gastroenterologist records.

timeline_events.title: Notice of Supplemental Discovery filed
timeline_events.description: Notice of Supplemental Discovery is filed.

timeline_events.title: Prosecutors announce intent to seek death penalty
timeline_events.description: The Ninth Judicial Circuit State Attorney's Office formally announces intent to seek the death penalty against Stephan Sterns.

timeline_events.title: Email records discovery (DA Docs 1601-1663)
timeline_events.description: Stephan Sterns Email Records (DA-Docs 1601-1663) are produced in discovery.

timeline_events.title: Sterns pleads not guilty; defense files motions to suppress
timeline_events.description: Sterns pleads not guilty. His defense files motions to suppress phone and Google data, arguing improper seizure. Legal teams concurrently dispute media access to trial records.

timeline_events.title: Corrections Department incident report
timeline_events.description: Sterns Corrections Department Incident Report filed.

timeline_events.title: Felony Court Notice setting pretrial hearing
timeline_events.description: Felony Court Notice is filed setting a pretrial hearing.

timeline_events.title: Hunter's Creek Middle School teacher Mitchell Regan arrested (unrelated)
timeline_events.description: Mitchell Regan, a teacher at Hunter's Creek Middle School (the school Madeline attended), is arrested on a federal criminal complaint for possession of child sexual abuse material. NOTE: This is an unrelated case but tangentially connected by location.

timeline_events.title: Defendant's Motion to Modify Jury Instructions filed
timeline_events.description: Defense files a Motion to Modify Jury Instructions.

timeline_events.title: Notice of Provision of State Witness List
timeline_events.description: Notice of Provision of State Witness List filed.

timeline_events.title: Notices of Taking Depositions filed
timeline_events.description: Notices of Taking Depositions and Taking Video Depositions are filed for the Stephan Sterns case.

timeline_events.title: Hunter's Creek Middle School music teacher Brett Bonini arrested (unrelated)
timeline_events.description: Italo Rafael Brett Bonini, a music teacher at Hunter's Creek Middle School, is arrested on federal charges for coercion and enticement of a minor. NOTE: Unrelated case, tangential to the Soto case only by school location.

timeline_events.title: Defense files Motion to Bar Execution by Lethal Injection
timeline_events.description: Defense files a Motion to Bar Execution by Lethal Injection, citing Fifth, Sixth, Eighth, and Fourteenth Amendments arguing the death penalty was cruel and unusual punishment.

timeline_events.title: Notice of Hearing filed
timeline_events.description: Notice of Hearing is filed.

timeline_events.title: One-year anniversary of Madeline's disappearance
timeline_events.description: One-year memorial coverage notes Sterns remains jailed pending two trials (sexual abuse and murder), with ongoing motions including hearings being closed.

timeline_events.title: Sterns Laboratory Report filed
timeline_events.description: A Sterns Laboratory Report is filed in the case.

timeline_events.title: Defense files multiple motions to suppress
timeline_events.description: Defense files motions to suppress: (1) evidence obtained from Google search warrant, (2) evidence obtained from unlawful searches of cell phone, and (3) evidence obtained from unlawful seizure of cell phone.

timeline_events.title: State responds to Defense motion on jury instruction for 'Mercy'
timeline_events.description: State files response to Defendant's motion for special jury instruction on 'Mercy'.

timeline_events.title: State files multiple responses to Defense motions
timeline_events.description: State files responses to Defense motions including: motion for disclosure of Brady v. Maryland materials, motion to declare death penalty statutes unconstitutional, motion in limine on trial procedures, and motion for real-time transcripts.

timeline_events.title: STERNS PLEADS NO CONTEST TO MURDER, GUILTY TO 60 SEX CRIMES
timeline_events.description: On the day before the first of two criminal trials was scheduled to begin, Stephan Sterns enters a plea agreement: pleads NO CONTEST to first-degree premeditated murder; pleads GUILTY to 8 counts of capital sexual battery (victim under 12), 5 counts of sexual battery (victim 12-18), and 47 other related sex offenses (60 total sex crimes). As part of the plea, prosecutors take the death penalty off the table. Family members deliver victim impact statements: Tyler Wallace (father), Letizia Nunez (aunt), Yolanda Zambrano (grandmother, via prosecutor), and the roommate (also a victim). Sterns delivers a nearly 90-second statement saying he had 'prayed to God countless times to trade places with her.' He is sentenced to 21 concurrent life sentences without the possibility of parole.
timeline_events.source: FOX 35 Orlando, NBC News, CBS Miami, Wikipedia

timeline_events.title: Memorial bench proposed in St. Cloud park
timeline_events.description: Following the resolution of the case, a memorial bench is proposed for a park in St. Cloud to commemorate Madeline Soto. A t-shirt drive is organized to fund the memorial.

physical_evidence: Hawaiian print black backpack (recovered from dumpster)
Orange County Public Schools laptop (in backpack)
Single white Croc (matched one in residence)
WD Easystore external drive SN: WX31A792CU5F (residence)
Hard drive (recovered from storage unit by Christopher Sterns)
Two USB drives (one with 35,000+ CSAM images)
Body of Madeline Soto - green sweater, blue jeans (Hickory Tree Road)
Multiple clothing items, towels, and personal items from residence
digital_evidence: Madeline's iPhone (Apple Health step data, charging history)
Jennifer Soto's iPhone (text messages, alarm settings)
Stephan Sterns' Google account login records
Recorded jail calls (e.g., 04/10/2024 call to Christopher Sterns)
surveillance_evidence: Venetian Bay apartment complex cameras (multiple time stamps)
9271 South John Young Parkway parking garage cameras (Holiday Inn)
Hunter's Creek Middle School area cameras
Hickory Tree Elementary School area cameras

vehicles_of_interest.role: Primary suspect vehicle - used to transport victim's body
Tracked driving same path as Stephan on 02/27/2024

key_locations.significance: Residence of victim; site of dumpster where evidence was recovered; surveillance footage central to case

key_locations.location: 9271 South John Young Parkway parking garage
key_locations.significance: Site where Stephan moved Madeline's body to trunk at 09:41 AM
Body recovery site - wooded area with bamboo trees
Where Stephan changed his tire; tire tread evidence found
Where Stephan was held pending trial; recorded jail calls were made from here
Where Christopher Sterns recovered hard drive and watch
Madeline's mental health provider; subject of records warrant
Site of all court proceedings, plea, and sentencing

metadata.data_compiled_for: True Crime Timeline Application Sample Data
metadata.notes_on_data: All times listed are based on the original investigation reports and surveillance footage timestamps. Some times have minor discrepancies between sources (e.g., Walter Roska's reported sighting time conflicts with the actual surveillance timeline). For a true crime timeline application, this data is suitable for demonstration purposes. Tangentially related events (the unrelated arrests of two Hunter's Creek Middle School teachers) are flagged with 'Tangential' category and should be filtered or visually distinguished from core case events.
